title: coprosma dumosa
intro: Coprosma dumosa, also known as the Mirror Bush, is a small shrub native to New Zealand, characterized by its glossy, oval-shaped leaves that reflect light. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Coprosma dumosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its traditional use to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Coprosma dumosa may include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
